steps.title: Focus on distinctive character
steps.content: The students claim that opposition to more car traffic comes from concern that Cuba Street would lose its distinctive character. The best quotation must express that worry directly, not a different objection to the proposal.

steps.title: Separate other objections
steps.content: A is about not being consulted. B focuses on possible harm to businesses. D objects to noise and exhaust from cars. The quotation about Cuba Street being unusual and becoming like any other street addresses the loss of distinctive character. The answer is C.
